title: Sri Lanka Vehicle & IT Intern Tracker v3.1 Input

TELEGRAM_VEHICLE_CHAT_ID.title: Telegram Vehicle Channel ID
TELEGRAM_VEHICLE_CHAT_ID.description: Channel ID for vehicle updates (market listings, dealers, news)

TELEGRAM_INTERN_CHAT_ID.title: Telegram Intern Channel ID
TELEGRAM_INTERN_CHAT_ID.description: Channel ID for IT internship updates

TELEGRAM_OPS_CHAT_ID.title: Telegram Ops Alert Chat ID (optional)
TELEGRAM_OPS_CHAT_ID.description: Separate channel for scraper health alerts. Falls back to vehicle channel.

MIN_PRICE_LKR.title: Minimum Vehicle Price (LKR)
MIN_PRICE_LKR.description: Minimum price filter — only show vehicles ABOVE this price. Default 10M.

MAX_PRICE_LKR.title: Maximum Vehicle Price (LKR)
MAX_PRICE_LKR.description: Upper price cap for vehicle alerts. Default 500M (effectively no cap).

MIN_VEHICLE_YEAR.title: Minimum Vehicle Year
MIN_VEHICLE_YEAR.description: Only alert used-market listings whose model year is this value or newer. Default 2022.

MAX_PAGES_PER_SITE.title: Max Pages Per Vehicle Market Site

DEALER_BRANDS.title: Official Dealer Brands (empty = all)
DEALER_BRANDS.description: Which official dealer brands to scrape. Leave empty for all 11.

NEWS_ENABLED.title: Enable Vehicle News Monitoring
NEWS_ENABLED.description: Monitor news sites for tax/price/import updates

INTERN_MAX_POST_AGE_DAYS.title: Max Intern Post Age (days)
INTERN_MAX_POST_AGE_DAYS.description: Only keep internship posts published within this many days. Older or undated posts are filtered out.
